allow: PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/v1/auth/signin" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test@test.com","password":"wrong"}' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object StatusCode, Content; if \(-not $?\) { Write-Output "---ERROR---"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/v1/auth/signin" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test@test.com","password":"wrong"}' } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message; Write-Output $_.ErrorDetails.Message } })
